title: wildcard source *-> + wildcard action
manager: Wildcard transitions — `*->` (from any state) and wildcard actions — so "from anywhere, on reset, go to start" is one edge instead of one copied onto every state. Wildcards are the DRY tool for cross-cutting transitions, and their interaction with specific edges is governed by the resolution order so a wildcard never silently shadows a deliberate specific transition you wrote on purpose.
cs: `*->` wildcard source + wildcard action; expand against the resolution order (W6.89); a specific edge beats a wildcard; fsl#1356.
